block_00: Learn the difference between the markets
block_01: The main factor that influences the outcomes of your trading session is the type of market you are trading. Understanding the difference between a bullish and a bearish trend is one of the very basic things that every trader needs to know.
block_02: Correct identification of the trend may help you react to the changes in a timely manner, spot price reversals and improve your trading approach.
block_03: If you wish to learn about the main characteristics of the bullish and bearish markets, and to know how to determine the ongoing trend, check the full article below.
